policy: All browser runtime UI assets, MediaPipe modules, WASM files and the hand model are same-origin local assets. The exact official model must be packaged for final release; build-time synchronization is a controlled fallback only.
note: Kurdish UI uses local Noto Kufi Arabic. Smart Shape, Workspace Navigator, Loading Experience, Performance Guard, exact video-overlay Hand Calibration, GPU-first local hand tracking and Device Readiness diagnostics run locally in the browser.

interfaceIconSystem.method: Semantic CSS mask classes backed by local SVG assets

releaseStatus: v6.5.0 Phase 6 adds a privacy-preserving Device Readiness panel with real, non-invasive browser/runtime checks and a local troubleshooting report.
